case_title: CITY HOUSING, INC. VS. HAROLD GARNER et al

docket_entries.description: ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT GARNER, HAROLD
DEMAND FOR JURY FILED BY DEFENDANT GARNER, HAROLD
SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: MICHEL, JAMES A. SUBSTITUTED FOR PRO PER AS ATTORNEY FOR GARNER, HAROLD

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GARNER, HAROLD THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 909 GEARY STREET, #516, SAN FRANCISCO, CALIFORNIA, STAYED UNTIL APR-23-2002, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT - IF DEFT DOES NOT VACATE BY APR-23-2002, PLTF WILL AMEND JUDGMENT FOR $675 UNPAID BACK RENT, AND DAMAGES OF $15 PER DAY FROM MAR-01-2002 TO APR-23-2002, COSTS OF $191 FOR A TOTAL OF $1,666. IF THE TERMS OF THE SETTLEMENT ARE COMPLIED WITH, THE PLTF WILL VACATE THE JUDGMENT AND DISMISS THE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE.
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC JURY FEES AND EXPENSES (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT GARNER, HAROLD ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC JURY FEES AND EXPENSES
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC REPORTERS FEES (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT GARNER, HAROLD ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC REPORTERS FEES
NOTICE OF SETTLEMENT HEARING SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR MAR-20-2002 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 218
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT GARNER, HAROLD
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $15.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY HOUSING, INC.
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT GARNER, HAROLD
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT GARNER, HAROLD ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS
MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY HOUSING, INC. SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON MAR-25-2002 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY HOUSING, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT GARNER, HAROLD DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
JUDGE RONALD EVANS QUIDACHAY, CLERK NICOLE OLCOMENDY, REPORTER BELDON YEE. REMOVED FROM MASTER JURY CALENDAR SET FOR MAR-25-2002 - CASE SETTLED, STIPULATED JUDGMENT TO BE FILED.
